title: Toms Server Additions: Bouncy Castle!
body:
This mod adds bouncy blocks in all colors.
Crafted with 8 slime blocks and 1 dye in the middle of a 3x3 crafting grid.

---

Make sure to enable [Polymer's autohost functionality](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/) to automatically share the resourcepack with players joining the server.
